name: CONOCOPHILLIPS
business: ConocoPhillips explores for, produces, transports, and markets crude oil, bitumen, natural gas, natural gas liquids, and liquefied natural gas on a worldwide basis. It is one of the world's leading exploration and production companies with operations in 14 countries.

exposures.sentence: We explore for, produce, transport and market crude oil, bitumen, natural gas, NGLs and LNG on a worldwide basis.
our equity LNG projects continued to advance at NFE and NFS in Qatar and PALNG on the U.S. Gulf Coast.

Our ability to achieve the stated targets, goals and ambitions within the Climate-related Risk Strategy's framework is subject to a number of risks and uncertainties beyond our control, including government policies and markets, acceptance of carbon capture technologies, development of markets and potential permitting and regulatory changes, all of which may impair our ability to execute on current or future plans.
We continue to evaluate low carbon opportunities for potential future investment in support of our operational emission reduction targets.

catalysts.sentence: In Canada, we achieved first oil at Surmont Pad 104W-A in December 2025.

catalysts.event: NFE startup expected in second half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: all projects remain on schedule with NFE startup expected in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Disposition target of $5 billion by year-end 2026
catalysts.sentence: We disposed of $3.2 billion of assets in 2025 and we expect to meet our $5 billion disposition target by year-end 2026.

catalysts.event: First-quarter 2026 ordinary dividend declared at 84 cents per share
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we declared a first-quarter ordinary dividend of 84 cents per share.
